$meta.label: Acuity Design System (mid-2025)
$meta.source: node_modules/@takecasper/acuity-design-system@1.27.13/dist/assets/index.css — Tailwind-compiled utility classes. Each value is traced to a ds-bg-*/ds-text-*/ds-border-*/ds-stroke-* rule. Shades absent from the compiled output are omitted (no fabrication).
$meta.note: This is the COMPILED palette. The ds- Tailwind classes encode role+shade in the class name; hex values are extracted from rgb() notation in the matching rule. The same theme colours underlie both one45-2020s and acuity-canon — the values are confirmed identical where both have coverage. Shades present in one45-2020s.json but absent from the compiled CSS (e.g. warning-yellow DEFAULT, many mid-scale shades) are NOT included here.
